element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns to navigate vertically scrolling space and target ground/air enemies
Teaches spatial awareness of mixed threat landscape
Bombs destroy enemies and bullets within range; introduces risk (auto-detonate if hit)
Green bunkers yield bomb ammo; red/gray bunkers spawn support helicopters
Up to 2 units can be recruited; varies firepower patterns
Hidden destructible objects reward exploration and precision
10 blocks destroyed = 1 extra life; encourages aggressive play
Death penalty is partial progress loss, not full stage restart

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching helipad at stage end (bonus points awarded)
Finding safe scrolling zones with minimal fire
typical_tension_triggers: Heavy enemy density in mid-stage sections
Dense bullet patterns from aircraft and artillery
Close proximity to ground hazards requiring precision
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Balanced between stressful and exciting sections with deliberate slow-paced helicopter movement enabling strategic route planning

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Ground targets offer bonus points; some are hidden secrets requiring deliberate destruction
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Destructible buildings, fuel depots, tents, mine carts yield bonus points when targeted; non-mandatory

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stage 1 introduces all core mechanics (missiles, bombs, pickups, ground/air targets) in balanced combination; manageable enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 2-3 increase enemy formations and projectile density; support helicopter recruitment becomes strategic necessity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 4 peaks difficulty; after completion, game loops to Stage 2 with higher difficulty for extended play
notable_spikes: Transition to Stage 2 (loop) - difficulty ramps above Stage 1
Mid-stage dense formations requiring bomb/wingman coordination

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Vertical scroll with mixed terrain threats
notable_level_patterns.description: Four distinct terrain types with mixed air/ground enemy patterns; slow helicopter scroll enables tactical positioning
Cross-shaped bunkers alternate between green (bomb ammo) and red/gray (support units); players manage resource economy across stage
Death resets to checkpoint rather than stage start; reduces frustration while maintaining progression stakes
Safe zone reached at stage completion; awards bonus points for carried bombs/wingmen, incentivizing resource retention
